# Ghostair — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A cycling accessories product focused on a revolutionary tire insert that permanently prevents flat tires (punctures) on bicycle wheels. The product solves a universal pain point for cyclists — the frustration of getting a flat — by offering a one-time, definitive solution. The brand positioning is bold and results-driven, with a strong promise of reliability and peace of mind for riders.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://example.com
הכנסו לעולם שבו פנצ&#39;רים הם נחלת העבר. Ghostair מציעה תוסף צמיג מהפכני שמונע תקרים באופן קבוע, ומעניק לכם שקט נפשי וביטחון מלא בכל רכיבה. גלו את הפתרון הסופי לרוכבים.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Ghostair
A cycling accessories product focused on a revolutionary tire insert that permanently prevents flat tires (punctures) on bicycle wheels. The product solves a universal pain point for cyclists — the frustration of getting a flat — by offering a one-time, definitive solution. The brand positioning is bold and results-driven, with a strong promise of reliability and peace of mind for riders.

## Target Audience
- רוכבי אופניים נלהבים
- רוכבי עיר לעבודה
- רוכבים מודעים לסביבה

## Industry
Cycling Accessories

---
